specific_question: How many internal security audits of Elexion Automotive's customer web portal did the cybersecurity team perform so far in 2025?
answer: The Elexion Automotive cybersecurity team has performed two internal security audits of the company's customer web portal thus far in 2025.
dr_question: Referencing the information shared in the April 2025 article from Help Net Security, what external cybersecurity market data involving the automotive industry should Elexion Automotive analyze by the end of Q4 2025 to protect consumer data and safety?
